option_line: zgr_makePitch9OMKIbuy4mil2:"Tri-Tachyon's Director of Special Acquisitions can afford a mere million credits. I accept."
original: Tri-Tachyon's Director of Special Acquisitions can afford a mere million credits. I accept.
translated: La Directrice des Acquisitions Speciales de Tri-Tachyon peut se permettre un malheureux million de credits. J'accepte.

original:
"Done," she says, her voice as empty as the Abyss.

Almost instantly, your TriPad pings with several alerts - credits transfer, but also notification from your tactical officer concerning an approaching Tri-Tachyon portside-tender, swarming with engineering drones, and your comms, forwarding certain docking requests directly to the Onslaught Mk.I.

"Take a moment to ensure your affairs are in order, captain," Glamor-Rotanev says.

You'd think she enjoys overwhelming your officers with the speed of her response.
translated:
"C'est fait," dit-elle, sa voix aussi vide que l'Abime.

Presque instantanement, votre TriPad sonne avec plusieurs alertes - transfert de credits, mais aussi une notification de votre officier tactique concernant un ravitailleur de Tri-Tachyon en approche, grouillant de drones d'ingenierie, et vos comms, transferant certaines demandes d'amarrage directement a l'Onslaught Mk.I.

"Prenez un moment pour mettre vos affaires en ordre, capitaine," dit Glamor-Rotanev.

Vous juriez qu'elle prend plaisir a submerger vos officiers par la rapidite de sa reponse.

original:
"Fine," she says, the spite cold in her voice.

"You've seen them. The Threat. Ancient, automated warfleets deep in the Abyss. And you lived." She is quite collected, suddenly, as she speaks.

"Would you part with recordings of your encounter with the Threat? I offer 100,000 credits for immediate transfer."
translated:
"Tres bien," dit-elle, le depit froid dans sa voix.

"Vous les avez vus. La Menace. D'anciennes flottes de guerre automatisees au fin fond de l'Abime. Et vous avez survecu." Elle est tres composee, soudain, en parlant.

"Accepteriez-vous de ceder les enregistrements de votre rencontre avec la Menace ? J'offre 100 000 credits pour un transfert immediat."

original:
Director Glamor-Rotanev takes a moment to turn and appear to look out over her spectacular view of the Xanadu Geodivision.

You're certain she's watching her teams as they board the Onslaught Mk.I through what are no doubt top-of-the-line cybernetic implants and neural integrations.

And, doubtless, watching your comms. Because just as you are finished, she turns back, resettling her facial muscles with a twitch.
translated:
La Directrice Glamor-Rotanev prend un moment pour se tourner et sembler contempler sa vue spectaculaire sur la Geodivision de Xanadu.

Vous etes certain qu'elle surveille ses equipes embarquant a bord de l'Onslaught Mk.I a travers ce qui sont sans aucun doute des implants cybernetiques et des integrations neurales de pointe.

Et, sans aucun doute, qu'elle surveille vos comms. Car des que vous avez termine, elle se retourne, reinstallant ses muscles faciaux d'un tressaillement.

original:
"As I was saying, I have a great interest in... specimens. Artifacts. Like yours. And like what I presume it was built to fight," she says. 

"You have been far more successful than the others. I would propose you repeat that success."
translated:
"Comme je le disais, j'ai un grand interet pour... les specimens. Les artefacts. Comme le votre. Et comme ce contre quoi il a ete construit pour combattre, je presume," dit-elle.

"Vous avez ete bien plus efficace que les autres. Je vous propose de renouveler ce succes."

option_line: zgr_makePitch11:"So there was another expedition before me?"
original: So there was another expedition before me?
translated: Donc il y avait une autre expedition avant moi ?

original:
Her eyes flicker subtly, her expression more glazed and vacant than before.

"Very... good, captain," she says. Her words come more rapidly. "You've seen them. The Threat. Ancient, automated warfleets deep in the Abyss. And you lived."

"Would you part with recordings of your encounter with the Threat? I offer 100,000 credits for immediate transfer."
translated:
Ses yeux clignotent subtilement, son expression plus vitreuse et absente qu'auparavant.

"Tres... bien, capitaine," dit-elle. Ses mots viennent plus rapidement. "Vous les avez vus. La Menace. D'anciennes flottes de guerre automatisees au fin fond de l'Abime. Et vous avez survecu."

"Accepteriez-vous de ceder les enregistrements de votre rencontre avec la Menace ? J'offre 100 000 credits pour un transfert immediat."
